content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.F9_AGENT_NON_PRODUCTIVE')  IS NOT NULL 
DROP TABLE [ODS].[F9_AGENT_NON_PRODUCTIVE]

GO

CREATE TABLE ODS.F9_AGENT_NON_PRODUCTIVE
(
DIVISION NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
AGENT_NAME NVARCHAR(255),
DATE DATETIME,
REASON_CODE NVARCHAR(255),
AGENT_STATE_TIME TIME,
FILE_NAME NVARCHAR(255)
);
